_comment: BetterDay typography system. Source of truth for fonts, weights, and type scale. Font files live in brand/fonts/. When adding a new face, drop the .otf/.woff2 in brand/fonts/ and register it here.

display.name: BDSupper
display.role: Display face — used for meal names on cards, logo wordmark, visual accents

heading.name: Gaya
heading.role: Heading face — used for section headers, cart title, nav logo, page titles

body.name: Sofia Pro Soft
body.role: Body / UI face — used for all body text, buttons, labels, UI copy

accent.name: Fastpen
accent.role: Accent / signature face — used sparingly for founder signatures, hand-written flourishes, or conversational accents. NOT for body copy.

scale._comment: Named sizes from design-tokens.md. Use by name, not by raw pixel value. If you need a size that isn't here, first consider whether one of these would work — if not, propose adding a new named size in a PR.
scale.heading: 22px
scale.caption: 11px
